intro: A lone headstone leans in the fog, fresher than the rest. The challenger beneath it almost made it - their fight was simply never finished.
title: Unfinished Business
description: The epitaph reads: "{{trainerName}}, a {{difficulty}}-mode challenger. Fell at wave {{waveReached}} to {{opponentName}}." The grave is restless. You could take up their cause and face the very team that ended their run - win, and the grateful spirit will pass on the prize they were reaching for. Or you could leave their fight unfinished.

1.label: Finish their fight
1.tooltip: (?) Battle the very team that ended their run. (+) Win to claim the prize they were reaching for.
1.selected: You take up the fallen challenger's cause. The team that beat them rises from the fog to meet you.

2.label: Walk on
2.tooltip: (-) Leave their fight unfinished. No cost.
2.selected: Some scores are not yours to settle. You leave the grave to its rest.
